DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>: A named config group. Each group is a runnable configuration profile.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys: Downloader configuration block (link scraping + HTML downloads).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys.download_loc: Directory where downloaded HTML pages will be saved.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys.download_urls: List of listing/search URLs (or direct pages if follow_links=false).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys.follow_links: If true, scrape embedded links from each download_url; if false, download each download_url directly.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys.link_selector: CSS selector used to find target page links on a listing/search page.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys.links_per_search: Maximum number of links to collect per listing/search URL.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys.filename_from_url_: Regex used to derive a stable filename from a downloaded page URL (optional but recommended).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.download_keys.title_selectors: Fallback CSS selectors used to locate a page title within a downloaded HTML page.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_keys: Extraction configuration block (read saved HTML and extract structured fields).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_keys.html_dir: Directory containing HTML pages to extract fields from (often the same as download_loc).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_keys.items_out_dir: Directory where extracted items are saved as JSON files.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_keys.basename_keys: Item keys used to build output filenames.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_keys.extract_rules: Rules describing how to extract fields from HTML (CSS selectors, optional separators, and optional regex extraction).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.extract_keys.extract_rules.<fiel: CSS selector used to extract a field from the HTML page.
Optional attribute name to read from the matched node instead of text content.
Optional separator used when joining extracted text content (commonly '\n').
Regex pattern applied to the raw HTML to extract a field. If present, it takes precedence over 'css'. The first capture group is used as the extracted value.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompt_keys: Prompt generation configuration block (turn extracted items into prompts and outputs).
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompt_keys.text_out_dir: Directory where generated text outputs are saved.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompt_keys.prompt_template_path: Path to the base prompt template file used to generate per-item prompts.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompt_keys.prompts_out_dir: Directory where per-item prompt text files are written.
DESCRIPTION.<GROUP>.prompt_keys.prompt_injection_key: List of extracted item keys to inject into the prompt template.
